staticText: Deterministic browser-local market-day planner in English, French and Swahili. Revenue is unit selling price times units sold. Sold-stock cost is unit cost times units sold. Stock-loss cost is unit cost times units lost or spoiled. Net daily profit is revenue minus sold-stock cost, stock-loss cost and user-entered operating expenses. Same-mix break-even revenue is stock-loss cost plus operating expenses divided by the gross contribution ratio and is unavailable when that ratio is zero or negative. The monthly scenario repeats the same day for a user-entered 1 to 31 market days. Currency is a user-entered display label only: there is no conversion, supplied rate, price, tax, fee or benchmark. Inputs are session-only unless the user explicitly saves a compact, versioned result in local browser history. History is filtered by currency and supports record deletion, currency-specific clearing and JSON backup. Current calculations can be copied or exported locally as CSV, JSON, text-based PDF or print. The AI manifest is route-only and accepts no calculator prefill.
